docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, STACEY
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,642.75 FILED BY HAMILTON, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, STACEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMILTON, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARTER, STACEY $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00, THE COURT'S AWARD OF DAMAGES HAS BEEN ADJUSTED TO ALLOW FOR PRE-EXISTING DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF'S CAR BUMPER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-04-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, STACEY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2009 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
